meaning: n.[药]利多卡因(一种局部麻醉剂)
examples: Despite the concerns about long acting agents, a mixture of lidocaine and marcaine is often used.
The most commonly used is 'Lidocaine' spray.
Aim To study the cutaneous permeation kinetics and pharmacodynamics of lidocaine gel.
He injected four shots of lidocaine into one nasolabial fold, and another four on the opposite side.
The needle hurt a little bit and I could feel the sting of the lidocaine when it entered.
